candidates.question: Find the square root of 226. Then take its reciprocal, and finally calculate the average of that reciprocal and 429.
Convert -4 degrees Celsius to Fahrenheit. Then convert that temperature back to Celsius, and divide the result by 10.
Subtract 79 from 727. Next, determine how many whole times 11 fits into that difference. Finally, check if this quotient is greater than 305.
Convert 9 degrees Celsius to Fahrenheit. Then raise that Fahrenheit value to the third power, and finally find the square root of the result.
How many hours are in 13 days? Then, clamp that number of hours between 70 and 126. Finally, find the absolute difference between that clamped value and 201.
